subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen hath testified that the people of Bahá are among the companions of the Crimson Ark which hath been sent down in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد القلم الاعلی لاهل البهاء انهم من اهل السفینه الحمرآء التی نزلت فی
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
